category_sources: Official LibreSSL site describes the project as a TLS/crypto stack with libcrypto, libssl, and libtls.
source_facts.description says LibreSSL is a version of the SSL/TLS protocol forked from OpenSSL.
display_name_sources: Official project site uses the display name LibreSSL.
docs_sources: Official portable repository README contains build and usage documentation.
Official project homepage is the primary documentation and project overview surface.
Official releases page documents supported portable releases.
repo_sources: Official portable repository README identifies github.com/libressl/portable as the LibreSSL portable build framework mirrored on GitHub.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was researched.
tags_sources: Official LibreSSL site lists libcrypto, libssl, and libtls components.
source_facts.description identifies SSL/TLS and OpenSSL fork context.
